name: 13F
short_description: You are a tired office worker who has been working overtime until late at night due to a heavy workload and is trapped in a strange office building. You have to get to the first floor quickly and go home to rest, because you have to go to work tomorrow morning!
detailed_description:
You are a tired office worker who works overtime until late at night because of the heavy workload. You have to go home and rest quickly because you have to go to work tomorrow morning. The elevator is broken, which means you need to walk to the first floor by stairs, and today's office building seems to be a little weird. . .

Inspired by "Exit 8", it is presented in the form of hand-painted pixel art and 2D platform, each pixel is carefully crafted!

35 carefully designed and interlocking abnormalities, and other secrets hidden in the office building, are waiting for your discovery!

If there is no abnormality, just go downstairs normally. If there is an abnormality, you can go to the next floor by going upstairs. So just find the abnormality, but sometimes things are not that simple.

This game is scary. Players with heart disease, high blood pressure, etc., please enter with caution and listen to the doctor's advice!

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
